sheet_name: แบบขยายบันได ST.3

view_title: แบบขยาย 1 -- stair railing/newel post detail, 1:25

elements.description: ราวบันไดไม้เนื้อแข็ง 2"x4" วางนอน -- hardwood handrail, 2x4 inch, laid horizontal
เหล็ก Ø1 1/2"x3" -- steel flat bar baluster support, 1.5x3 inch, at top (0.25m band)
เหล็ก Ø1"x2" -- steel flat bar, 1x2 inch (0.15m band)
เหล็ก Ø1"x1" -- steel square/flat bar, 1x1 inch (0.15m band)
เหล็ก Ø1"x2" -- steel flat bar, 1x2 inch (0.15m band)
concrete embed base for the railing post, 0.20m band, cast into the stair slab/step

warnings: Second of 3 views on this page; siblings are the full stair section (_view1_st3_section.json) and tread/riser detail (_view3_st3_tread_riser_detail.json).
Note the Ø symbol here is used loosely for flat/square steel bar cross-sections (not round bar diameter as in rebar notation elsewhere in this project) -- transcribed as printed.
